name: Vexation
description: A Maliwan SMG variant that always spawns with a shock barrel, giving it stronger status chance and damage over time than a typical weapon in its tier. A matching Maliwan grip pushes those elemental strengths even further. It is not especially glamorous by rarity, but its reliable shock output can carry fights very effectively.
notes: Related fixed-element Maliwan SMGs include Provacateur for incendiary, Venom for corrosive, Revenant for slag, and Hyperborean for cryo. A generation bug can make some blue versions display purple-style title coloring, and with Colorblind Mode enabled they may even show as purple. Because of that same issue, blue and purple rolls with identical parts can end up with identical stats. Random world drop from suitable loot sources.
